rationale: The France-Germany fighter jet program collapse has mild indirect relevance to Portugal's EU defense posture, but this cycle is otherwise quiet for Portuguese residents.

top_events.title: France-Germany jet plans crash: Can Europe end reliance on US for security?
top_events.summary: The FCAS collapse deepens EU defense fragmentation; for Portugal this is an indirect concern about EU strategic autonomy and potential defense spending pressures, but no immediate daily impact.

top_events.title: Pope Leo visits Canary Islands to highlight perilous migrant journeys
top_events.summary: Pope's visit to the Canary Islands draws attention to Atlantic migration routes close to Portugal's sphere; raises EU migration policy debate but no direct policy change for Portuguese residents.

top_events.title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims Iran deal near
top_events.summary: Iran deal stalemate keeps mild energy price uncertainty alive for Portugal; no change from known situation, continued slow decay of impact.
